summary: This is an extremely brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky lets readers know that a FogBugz demo presented in Austin was filmed and would be made available on his website soon. The post contains virtually no substantive content beyond this logistical update. It serves purely as a placeholder notification for upcoming video content.
key_points: A FogBugz product demo was conducted in Austin
The demo was filmed for later distribution
The video would be published on Joel's website within days
money_quotes: The FogBugz demo in Austin was filmed, and be available on this site in a few days.
key_insight: This is a minimal logistical announcement with no analytical or editorial content to extract meaningful insights from.
